/usr/bin/c++ -rdynamic -Wl,--enable-new-dtags CMakeFiles/motion_control.dir/__/msg/generated/geometry_msgs/point.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/motion_control.dir/__/msg/generated/geometry_msgs/pose.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/motion_control.dir/__/msg/generated/geometry_msgs/pose2d.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/motion_control.dir/__/msg/generated/geometry_msgs/quaternion.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/motion_control.dir/__/msg/generated/geometry_msgs/twist.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/motion_control.dir/__/msg/generated/geometry_msgs/vector3.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/motion_control.dir/__/msg/generated/nav_msgs/odometry.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/motion_control.dir/__/msg/generated/pnc_msgs/planning_trajectory.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/motion_control.dir/__/msg/generated/pnc_msgs/point_vec.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/motion_control.dir/__/msg/generated/std_msgs/header.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/motion_control.dir/src/controller_base.cpp.o CMakeFiles/motion_control.dir/src/motion_control_node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/motion_control.dir/src/mpc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/motion_control.dir/src/test_zmq_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/motion_control.dir/src/zmq_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/motion_control.dir/src/zmq_publisher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/motion_control.dir/src/zmq_subscriber.cpp.o -o motion_control   -L/home/yat/Mower_env/src/motion_control/../third_party/libzmq-4.3.5/build/lib  -L/home/yat/Mower_env/src/motion_control/../third_party/osqp/lib  -L/home/yat/Mower_env/src/motion_control/../third_party/osqp-eigen/lib  -L/home/yat/Mower_env/src/motion_control/../third_party/yaml-cpp-master/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/yat/Mower_env/src/motion_control/../third_party/osqp-eigen/lib:/home/yat/Mower_env/src/motion_control/../third_party/osqp/lib:/home/yat/Mower_env/src/motion_control/../third_party/libzmq-4.3.5/build/lib:/home/yat/Mower_env/src/motion_control/../third_party/yaml-cpp-master/lib: -lprotobuf -lzmq -latomic -lOsqpEigen -losqp -Wl,-Bstatic -lyaml-cpp -Wl,-Bdynamic
